error_signature: overflow for the form section needed to be set to SCROLL
title: Form section overflow not set to SCROLL
symptom: The main section does not expand properly, causing layout issues with the sticky header and footer.
not_this_if: Layout works correctly without sticky elements
root_cause: The overflow property of the form section controls how content is displayed when it exceeds the container's size. If it's not set to SCROLL, the layout can break, preventing the main section from expanding as intended.
fix_steps: Select the form section in the editor
Set the overflow property to SCROLL
Save the changes and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Set the overflow property of the form section to SCROLL.
